title: Carpenters Squares Tool, Preciva Combination Square12 Inch/300mm, Stainstainless Steel Angle Ruler, Woodworking Toolkit L Shape (Carpenter Square)
features: [Multifunctional Marker Ruler] Preciva carpenter square tool can be used to measure, scribe, mark angles,etc. One rule is multi-purpose! Allowing you to complete the work smoothly and no longer need to change tools frequently.

[Fast Positioning Angle] 10 common fixed angles can be quickly marked without reading. Every 1cm on the ruler is designed with holes for scribing. Go well with the scribing needle, you can quickly locate the angle you need.

[High Precision] The aluminum alloy 12inch angle ruler adopts laser scale, which is clear and wear-resistant. Also easy to read. The ruler will not deform and rust even after long-term use. Guarantee the accuracy and authenticity of your measurement results.

[Easy to Measure] The sturdy aluminum body, also with unique retractable metal ledge support, is greatly useful for stabilizing the handle on any surface. You can avoid measurement errors due to jitter. The L-shaped shape is also perfect for hand-holding while working.

[Wide Used] Our protractor can be used for multi-dimensional measurement, scribing, layout etc. An ideal tool for woodworkers, home builders, DIY hobbyist. Let's start your infinite creative journey now.
description: Product Description Thanks for Choosing Preciva Carpenter Square Tool ! Previous page Unique retractable metal bracket support, helping the ruler stay stable on the project surface. Using for pre-drawing 45° angles. Using for pre-drawing 90° internal and external angles. Parallel line marking holes for smoothing every 0.5cm. Next page It can be used to mark and draw lines at multiple angles including 10°, 15°, 20°, 30°, 45°, 50°, 60°, 70°, 80°, and 90°. Paired with a concealed stainless steel scribing needle, it can also serve as your alternative pencil. Utilizing laser marking, the surface scale is clearly visible, making it easy to read. Multiple hanging holes are designed so that you can choose different hanging methods according to your needs.
